# BuildTrack

> BuildTrack is a construction operating system for managing tasks, timesheets, approvals, procurement, QA/QC, HSE, financials, and reporting across construction projects end-to-end.

BuildTrack helps project managers, engineers, supervisors, and accountants run job sites with audit-ready data. The platform spans WBS planning, daily reports, RFIs, variation orders, payroll, and executive dashboards.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Project overview and KPIs.
- [Projects](/projects): Directory of all construction projects.
- [WBS](/wbs): Work breakdown structure and Gantt scheduling.
- [Tasks](/tasks): Task management across all disciplines.
- [Timesheets](/timesheets): Crew time tracking and approvals.
- [Approvals](/approvals): Cross-module approval inbox.
- [Procurement](/procurement): Materials, RFQs, POs, GRNs, and budgets.
- [Construction](/construction): Site execution and equipment tracking.
- [Quality](/quality): QA/QC inspections, NCRs, and punch lists.
- [Safety & HSE](/hse): Health, safety, and environmental tracking.
- [Financials](/financials): Cost control, claims, and reporting.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Progress and performance dashboards.
- [Reports](/reports): Operational and executive reports.
- [HR](/hr): People, attendance, and leave management.
- [Documents](/documents): Document register and transmittals.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access.
